Class Slot

java.lang.Object
VM.Slot
public class Slot extends Object
Represents a slot in the vending machine that stores a single type of item. Each slot has a fixed capacity and tracks its inventory and sales information.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Slot(Item item, int capacity)
    Constructs a slot with the specified item and capacity.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    decreaseStock()
    Decreases the stock by one and records the sale of the item.
    int

    Returns the stock level immediately after the most recent restocking.

    Returns the item assigned to this slot.

    Returns the current stock of the item.
    boolean

    Determines whether the slot is fully stocked.
    boolean
    itemAvailable()
    Determines whether the slot contains at least one item.
    void

    Adds the specified quantity to the current stock.
    void
    updateInitialStock()
    Updates the recorded initial stock to match the current stock.

    Methods inherited from class Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Constructor Details

    • Slot

      public Slot(Item item, int capacity)
      Constructs a slot with the specified item and capacity. If the specified capacity is less than 10, the slot capacity is set to 10. If it exceeds 60, the slot capacity is set to 60. The slot is initially filled to its maximum capacity.
      Parameters:
      item - the item assigned to this slot
      capacity - the desired maximum number of items the slot can hold

  • Method Details

    • getItem

      public Item getItem()
      Returns the item assigned to this slot.
      Returns:
      the item stored in this slot

    • isFull

      public boolean isFull()
      Determines whether the slot is fully stocked.
      Returns:
      true if the slot is at maximum capacity; false otherwise

    • getStock

      public int getStock()
      Returns the current stock of the item.
      Returns:
      the number of items currently available

    • itemAvailable

      public boolean itemAvailable()
      Determines whether the slot contains at least one item.
      Returns:
      true if the slot has available stock; false otherwise

    • setStock

      public void setStock(int stock)
      Adds the specified quantity to the current stock. If the resulting stock exceeds the slot's capacity, the stock is set to the maximum capacity. The transaction record is then updated to reflect the new stock level.
      Parameters:
      stock - the quantity of items to add

    • decreaseStock

      public void decreaseStock()
      Decreases the stock by one and records the sale of the item.

    • getInitialStock

      public int getInitialStock()
      Returns the stock level immediately after the most recent restocking.
      Returns:
      the initial stock level

    • updateInitialStock

      public void updateInitialStock()
      Updates the recorded initial stock to match the current stock.
